{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
    <DESCRIPTION>noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, √†</DESCRIPTION>
    <PRICE>12. Gulden</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <OFFER>oder gegen einem neuen</OFFER>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
    <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
  </BIBL>
  <DESCRIPTION>zu vertauschen.</DESCRIPTION>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"Added XML declaration, corrected PRIZE to PRICE, added DESCRIPTION tags for text outside BIBL, added OFFER tag for the exchange offer, and ensured all tags are properly nested and closed."}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
    <DESCRIPTION>noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, √†</DESCRIPTION>
    <PRICE>12. Gulden</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <OFFER>oder gegen einem neuen</OFFER>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
    <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
  </BIBL>
  <DESCRIPTION>zu vertauschen.</DESCRIPTION>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Added XML declaration, corrected PRIZE to PRICE, added DESCRIPTION tags for text outside BIBL, added OFFER tag for the exchange offer, and ensured all tags are properly nested and closed.
